'''Byss''' was a [[Binary star system/Legends|binary star]] with [[Abyss/Legends|Abyss]] in the [[Abyss system/Legends|Byss and Abyss system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Byss (Abyssin)/Legends|Byss]]<ref>This refers to the homeworld of the [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]], not the reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] stronghold also called [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].</ref> [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] these [[Star/Legends|stars]] in a unique figure-eight pattern.

The planet Byss had a hot and arid climate with unbearable temperatures that reached their apex when it passed between its two suns.

{{Star-stub}}
